title: convolvulus fruticulosus var. glandulosus
intro: Convolvulus fruticulosus var. glandulosus, also known as the hairy bindweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Convolvulus fruticulosus var. glandulosus include soothing digestive issues, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting the immune system. Convolvulus fruticulosus var. glandulosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
